items.title: Fetch & API Calls
items.description: fetch returns a Promise; you await it (and await res.json()) to read API responses.

items.title: Types & Interfaces
items.description: Async functions return Promise<T>; typing T documents what a call resolves to.

items.title: Node.js Basics
items.description: Node's non-blocking event loop is what makes Promises and async I/O efficient on the server.
